body:
# **Blazify's Bank**

Welcome to the world of finance in Minecraft with Streive's Bank Mod! This innovative addition to your gameplay introduces a fully functional banking system, allowing players to manage their in-game currency, invest, and experience a new level of economic interaction within the virtual realm.


# **Key Features:**

## **Currency's**

Banking System: Establish your very own bank account in the world of Minecraft. Deposit and withdraw emeralds, gold, or any other in-game currency with ease. Keep your valuables safe and secure in your virtual vault

![Money](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8550ab6ac0769d3e126761bac96baf6cd7c4772b.jpeg)



## **Atm Machines**

ATM Machines: Conveniently access your funds anytime, anywhere with the addition of ATM machines. These functional ATMs enable players to withdraw or deposit currency on the go, making financial transactions a breeze.

![Atm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75f953d4faacc1c9022bfcd62efcde764ea8645d.jpeg)

## **_Atm's GUI_**

A Crafted Vanillia styled AtmUI, It's offering you a beautiful apperance, In left side you have a place to insert your Card and then in the Right Side, you can see your stuff!

![GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69faf2d23fc34ec593365296dff86964ccbe0dfb.jpeg)
